title: Frog Tape Green Multi Surface Painters Masking Tape, Indoor Painting and Decorating For Sharp Lines and No Paint Bleed 36mm x 55m
features: Keeps paint out, keeps lines sharp
For use on cured paint, wood, glass and metal
The only masking tape treated with PaintBlock technology
As with all quality masking tapes, please test on a small area before and remove soon after painting
